questions.question: What nation yielded a 176-pound gold nugget named 'Welcome Stranger'?
What San Francisco rock group spawned the phrase, 'What a long strange trip it's been'?
Who did Alexander Butterfield help set up a voice-activated recording system for?
What had sales of 15.5 million and accounted for half the world's auto output in a 19-year span?
What artifact, two-and-a-half miles deep, could be toured for $32,500, in 1998?
What F. Scott Fitzgerald novel's autographed first edition did Neiman-Marcus offer for $35,000 in its 1997 Christmas catalog?
